coldvessel-info-active: Cold vessel: active, {0:0.0}h left (x{1:0.##} spoil speed)
coldvessel-info-inactive: Cold vessel: inactive. Add ice + food.
coldvessel-handbook-text:
Cold vessels can cool perishable food when a coolant is stored inside with the food. Cooling applies an extra spoil-speed multiplier on top of normal vessel, cellar, room, and food-category preservation.

The vessel consumes only one coolant when cooling time is empty and perishable food is present. Extra coolant remains stored for later refills.

Default coolant time
Snow Block: 6h
Cut Ice: 12h
Lake Ice, Glacier Ice, and Raw Ice: 48h
Packed Glacier Ice: 96h
